creator: nemoliu@gmail.com
text:
I had make a mistake of BUILD_DEPNEDS. I fix it now. The attachment is
the new patch.

On 3/23/07, nemo <nemoliu@gmail.com> wrote:
> ok,I will check it now.
>
>
